description: A faithful pink Tom-like mechanical cat Codex pet based on the provided reference image, with a wide soft hat, warm friendly face, plush-toy body, and light antique rose-gold joints.

idle.notes: Calm standing idle with tiny blink, slight hat-brim sway, and soft tail motion.

walk.notes: Directional relaxed walk rows used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Gentle head tilt and observant friendly look.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased gesture with a small paw lift and warmer expression.

sleep.notes: Main dozing loop with closed eyes, relaxed limbs, and stable hat.

sit.notes: Dedicated seated rest loop stored in the spare atlas row.

probe.notes: Gentle in-place task loop without directional travel or extra props.

deep_rest.notes: Deeper sleepy curl used as a calm extra rest state.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing walk rows rather than mirrored guesses.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, body, paws, tail, and hat stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
